TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-moving_Takun
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kala panqu'anaymu ku' gingamilan nku' nanavakis sunga'.
S.PHON: kala panquʔanajmu kuʔ ɣiŋamilan nkuʔ nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: kala panqu'anaymu ku' gingamilan nku' nanavakis sunga'.
S.PHON: kala panquʔanajmu kuʔ ɣiŋamilan nkuʔ nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我來敘述以前祖先的起源.
I'll describe the origins of our ancestors in the past.

S.FORM: tiku gingamilanta' ka navakis sunga' ga minkahul kia papak ru minsa'a'utu'ta' kia kahavag ka ka' a'iani runi i taiwan.
S.PHON: tiku ɣiŋamilantaʔ ka na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa minkaħul kia papak ru mins~ɕaʔaʔutuʔtaʔ kia kaħa*aɣ ka kaʔ aʔiani runi i taiwan.
S.FORM: tiku gingamilanta' ka navakis sunga' ga minkahul kia papak ru minsa'a'utu'ta' kia kahavag ka ka' a'iani runi i taiwan.
S.PHON: tiku ɣiŋamilantaʔ ka na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa minkaħul kia papak ru mins~ɕaʔaʔutuʔtaʔ kia kaħa*aɣ ka kaʔ aʔiani runi i taiwan.
S.TRANSL: 我們祖先的起源來自大霸尖山,原本住在台灣的人們都曾經聚集在那裏.
The origin of our ancestors in the past was from the Papak Mountain, and those who were originally here in Taiwan had all been aggregated there.

S.FORM: tuliq ru wahan na vayhu la wahan na vayhu ru siluhey ku papak ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ru waħan na *ajħu la waħan na *ajħu ru s~ɕiluħej ku papak ru.
S.FORM: tuliq ru wahan na vayhu la wahan na vayhu ru siluhey ku papak ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ru waħan na *ajħu la waħan na *ajħu ru s~ɕiluħej ku papak ru.
S.TRANSL: 突然間,風災就來了,然後風災來了之後大霸尖山就倒塌了.
Suddenly, a typhoon came, and after that the Papak mountain collapsed.

S.FORM: masugagai kumiyum su naniqun kahavag ku itaal runi taiwan ru.
S.PHON: mas~ɕuɣaɣai kumijum s~ɕu naniqun kaħa*aɣ ku itaal runi taiwan ru.
S.FORM: masugagai kumiyum su naniqun kahavag ku itaal runi taiwan ru.
S.PHON: mas~ɕuɣaɣai kumijum s~ɕu naniqun kaħa*aɣ ku itaal runi taiwan ru.
S.TRANSL: 原本住在台灣的人們就分開去尋找食物.
All the people originally living here in Taiwan then separated to look for food.

S.FORM: aruwa yumiax tigi karinku ku ruma' muwah tigi taoyuan ku ruma' muwah tigi vari ku ruma' musa nantou ku ruma'.
S.PHON: aruwa jumiax tiɣi karinku ku rumaʔ muwaħ tiɣi taojuan ku rumaʔ muwaħ tiɣi *ari ku rumaʔ mus~ɕa nantou ku rumaʔ.
S.FORM: aruwa yumiax tigi karinku ku ruma' muwah tigi taoyuan ku ruma' muwah tigi vari ku ruma' musa nantou ku ruma'.
S.PHON: aruwa jumiax tiɣi karinku ku rumaʔ muwaħ tiɣi taojuan ku rumaʔ muwaħ tiɣi *ari ku rumaʔ mus~ɕa nantou ku rumaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有些人往下到了花蓮;有些人來到桃園;有些人來到苗栗;有些人去到了南投.
Some went downward to Hualien; some came to Taoyuan; some came to Miaoli; some went to Nantou.

S.FORM: suoyi tiku hani la ga ini' paska' kahavag na'aring kia ini' paska' ku kai'ta' ka itaal ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕuoji tiku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ kaħa*aɣ naʔariŋ kia iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ ku kaiʔtaʔ ka itaal ru.
S.FORM: suoyi tiku hani la ga ini' paska' kahavag na'aring kia ini' paska' ku kai'ta' ka itaal ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕuoji tiku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ kaħa*aɣ naʔariŋ kia iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ ku kaiʔtaʔ ka itaal ru.
S.TRANSL: 所以現在大家彼此都不同了.自從那時候泰雅族的語言就都彼此不相像了.
So, now we are all different from each other. Our languages of the Atayal people have all become different since then.

S.FORM: tiku muvaq runi i vari hani ga taiyazu salun ku minuka muvaq vari ga aqih gi qaisun ragiax la ga ini' paska' ku hanaang na ka kai' la gi.
S.PHON: tiku mu*aq runi i *ari ħani ɣa taija*u s~ɕalun ku minuka mu*aq *ari ɣa aqiħ ɣi qais~ɕun raɣiax la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ ku ħanaaŋ na ka kaiʔ la ɣi.
S.FORM: tiku muvaq runi i vari hani ga taiyazu salun ku minuka muvaq vari ga aqih gi qaisun ragiax la ga ini' paska' ku hanaang na ka kai' la gi.
S.PHON: tiku mu*aq runi i *ari ħani ɣa taija*u s~ɕalun ku minuka mu*aq *ari ɣa aqiħ ɣi qais~ɕun raɣiax la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ ku ħanaaŋ na ka kaiʔ la ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 下到苗栗這裡的,就稱做為泰雅族.但是因為被山脈隔開,語言的腔調就彼此不相像.
Those who came downward to Miaoli here are called the Atayal people. Since we are separated by the mountains from each other, unfortunately, the accents of our languages do not resemble each other.

S.FORM: vali asi nku zitai sku hani maglu karari'ax ru ru maska' ku kai' kia ku ruma' imuliq ku hanaang na kai' kia ku ruma' ga ga mahuay ku kai'nha' ru.
S.PHON: *ali as~ɕi nku *itai s~ɕku ħani maɣlu karariʔax ru ru mas~ɕkaʔ ku kaiʔ kia ku rumaʔ imuliq ku ħanaaŋ na kaiʔ kia ku rumaʔ ɣa ɣa maħuaj ku kaiʔnħaʔ ru.
S.FORM: vali asi nku zitai sku hani maglu karari'ax ru ru maska' ku kai' kia ku ruma' imuliq ku hanaang na kai' kia ku ruma' ga ga mahuay ku kai'nha' ru.
S.PHON: *ali as~ɕi nku *itai s~ɕku ħani maɣlu karariʔax ru ru mas~ɕkaʔ ku kaiʔ kia ku rumaʔ imuliq ku ħanaaŋ na kaiʔ kia ku rumaʔ ɣa ɣa maħuaj ku kaiʔnħaʔ ru.

TRANSL.notes: 不像現在的時代每天聚集在一起,語言才會彼此相向.(因為被山脈隔開)有一些人語言的腔調比較重,有些人他們的語言腔調比較溫和謙遜.

S.TRANSL: 不像現在的時代每天聚集在一起,語言才會彼此相向. 有一些人語言的腔調比較重,有些人他們的語言腔調比較溫和謙遜.

TRANSL.notes: It wasn't like the modern era when we gather around everyday, so that the languages resemble each other. (Because being separated by mountains,) there are some people with heavy accents, and there are those whose language sounds moderate.

S.TRANSL: It wasn't like the modern era when we gather around everyday, so that the languages resemble each other. there are some people with heavy accents, and there are those whose language sounds moderate.

S.FORM: kia ku san mha matu'au kia ku san mha matu'uwal.
S.PHON: kia ku s~ɕan mħa matuʔau kia ku s~ɕan mħa matuʔuwal.
S.FORM: kia ku san mha matu'au kia ku san mha matu'uwal.
S.PHON: kia ku s~ɕan mħa matuʔau kia ku s~ɕan mħa matuʔuwal.

TRANSL.notes: 有些人(的語言)就稱作Matu'au,有些人(的語言)就稱做Matu'uwal.

S.TRANSL: 有些人 就稱作Matu'au,有些人 就稱做Matu'uwal.

TRANSL.notes: There are those who are (whose language is) called Matu'au, and there are those who are (whose language is) called Matu'uwal.

S.TRANSL: There are those who are called Matu'au, and there are those who are called Matu'uwal.

S.FORM: ru' tiku sami ka mavatu'an hani hiya' ga na'aring sami i kia muwah ru ukas vay naniqun.
S.PHON: ruʔ tiku s~ɕami ka ma*atuʔan ħani ħijaʔ ɣa naʔariŋ s~ɕami i kia muwaħ ru ukas~ɕ *aj naniqun.
S.FORM: ru' tiku sami ka mavatu'an hani hiya' ga na'aring sami i kia muwah ru ukas vay naniqun.
S.PHON: ruʔ tiku s~ɕami ka ma*atuʔan ħani ħijaʔ ɣa naʔariŋ s~ɕami i kia muwaħ ru ukas~ɕ *aj naniqun.
S.TRANSL: 而我們在Mavatu'an這裡,自從我們來了之後就真的都沒有食物.
As for us, the people of Mavatu'an here, since we had come, there really wasn't any food.

S.FORM: asi paglu kina qasinu gi kia ukas a patus sunga' gi vali kia a qavuli' uwi.
S.PHON: as~ɕi paɣlu kina qas~ɕinu ɣi kia ukas~ɕ a patus~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣi *ali kia a qa*uliʔ uwi.
S.FORM: asi paglu kina qasinu gi kia ukas a patus sunga' gi vali kia a qavuli' uwi.
S.PHON: as~ɕi paɣlu kina qas~ɕinu ɣi kia ukas~ɕ a patus~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣi *ali kia a qa*uliʔ uwi.
S.TRANSL: 只能和野獸在一起,因為以前沒有槍,也沒有火藥.
We had no choice but stay together with the beasts because there were no guns in the past, and no gun powder either.

S.FORM: nanak ku puting takis vay ku rasunmian ru.
S.PHON: nanak ku putiŋ takis~ɕ *aj ku ras~ɕunmian ru.
S.FORM: nanak ku puting takis vay ku rasunmian ru.
S.PHON: nanak ku putiŋ takis~ɕ *aj ku ras~ɕunmian ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們所攜帶的真的只有獵刀.
What we brought were really only the hunting knives.

S.FORM: iniwan na qasinu kinqiyanuxmian sunga' i.
S.PHON: iniwan na qas~ɕinu kinqijanuxmian s~ɕuŋaʔ i.
S.FORM: iniwan na qasinu kinqiyanuxmian sunga' i.
S.PHON: iniwan na qas~ɕinu kinqijanuxmian s~ɕuŋaʔ i.
S.TRANSL: 我們過去的生活就和野獸一樣.
Our lives in the past were the same as those of the beasts.

S.FORM: talan qutux qasinu ga tutingun ru nanu yani ku siqiyanux nku sami ka itaal hani.
S.PHON: talan qutux qas~ɕinu ɣa tutiŋun ru nanu jani ku s~ɕiqijanux nku s~ɕami ka itaal ħani.
S.FORM: talan qutux qasinu ga tutingun ru nanu yani ku siqiyanux nku sami ka itaal hani.
S.PHON: talan qutux qas~ɕinu ɣa tutiŋun ru nanu jani ku s~ɕiqijanux nku s~ɕami ka itaal ħani.
S.TRANSL: 如果看到一隻野獸,就把牠打死,我們這裡的泰雅族人就是靠這個維生.
If we saw a beast, we beat it, and that was what we, the Atayal people here, depended on when living.

S.FORM: ru maqahquwawsami ru muwahsami i yahu na papak la ru.
S.PHON: ru maqaħquwaws~ɕami ru muwaħs~ɕami i jaħu na papak la ru.
S.FORM: ru maqahquwawsami ru muwahsami i yahu na papak la ru.
S.PHON: ru maqaħquwaws~ɕami ru muwaħs~ɕami i jaħu na papak la ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們下坡然後就來到大霸尖山的下面.
We went downhill and came to the foot of the Papak Mountain.

S.FORM: ru lumuag tikay su gaghap na na pati' la ku itaal.
S.PHON: ru lumuaɣ tikaj s~ɕu ɣaɣħap na na patiʔ la ku itaal.
S.FORM: ru lumuag tikay su gaghap na na pati' la ku itaal.
S.PHON: ru lumuaɣ tikaj s~ɕu ɣaɣħap na na patiʔ la ku itaal.
S.TRANSL: 泰雅人找到了一些稻米的種子.
The Atayal people found some rice seeds.

S.FORM: ki'i vinuway vay nku kamisama' ku yani su kaqiyanux ru.
S.PHON: kiʔi *inuwaj *aj nku kamis~ɕamaʔ ku jani s~ɕu kaqijanux ru.
S.FORM: ki'i vinuway vay nku kamisama' ku yani su kaqiyanux ru.
S.PHON: kiʔi *inuwaj *aj nku kamis~ɕamaʔ ku jani s~ɕu kaqijanux ru.
S.TRANSL: 大概是上帝的賞賜,那樣才能過活.
That's probably God's gift, so that we can live on in that way.

S.FORM: ta'aringun kia tumuvux.
S.PHON: taʔariŋun kia tumu*ux.
S.FORM: ta'aringun kia tumuvux.
S.PHON: taʔariŋun kia tumu*ux.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候開始就播種.
From then on we have sowed.

S.FORM: ikia tikay ku irarawq na kahuniq ga pinangun ru ru tuvuxan tikay vali kituwa' ska' suvalay tahunakan.
S.PHON: ikia tikaj ku irarawq na kaħuniq ɣa pinaŋun ru ru tu*uxan tikaj *ali kituwaʔ s~ɕkaʔ s~ɕu*alaj taħunakan.
S.FORM: ikia tikay ku irarawq na kahuniq ga pinangun ru ru tuvuxan tikay vali kituwa' ska' suvalay tahunakan.
S.PHON: ikia tikaj ku irarawq na kaħuniq ɣa pinaŋun ru ru tu*uxan tikaj *ali kituwaʔ s~ɕkaʔ s~ɕu*alaj taħunakan.
S.TRANSL: 如果有一些樹長得較矮的地方,就拿來開墾,然後播一點種,範圍不大,剛好可以坐下.
If there were some areas with short trees, we cultivated them, and sowed a little bit in some areas that were not large but were really just large enough for one to sit on.

S.FORM: tumuvux ku kaknayril la ga.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ku kaknajril la ɣa.
S.FORM: tumuvux ku kaknayril la ga.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ku kaknajril la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 女人們播種.
The women sowed.

S.FORM: ga musa' i qumaluap ku ku tamalung hiya' ru.
S.PHON: ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i qumaluap ku ku tamaluŋ ħijaʔ ru.
S.FORM: ga musa' i qumaluap ku ku tamalung hiya' ru.
S.PHON: ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i qumaluap ku ku tamaluŋ ħijaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 男人們去打獵.
The men went hunting.

S.FORM: ukas a timu' sunga'.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ a timuʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: ukas a timu' sunga'.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ a timuʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前沒有鹽.
There was no salt in the past.

S.FORM: nanuan ku timu' sunga' pisa.
S.PHON: nanuan ku timuʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ pis~ɕa.
S.FORM: nanuan ku timu' sunga' pisa.
S.PHON: nanuan ku timuʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ pis~ɕa.
S.TRANSL: 以前的鹽巴是什麼呢?
What do we have as salt in the past?

S.FORM: tiku pa panaqali' su qali' na kahuniq ka tatimu' rakus ga isamama'ah tikay la ga yani a timu' ru kitku pring ga vuwaynia' ga alan su timu'.
S.PHON: tiku pa panaqaliʔ s~ɕu qaliʔ na kaħuniq ka tatimuʔ rakus~ɕ ɣa is~ɕamamaʔaħ tikaj la ɣa jani a timuʔ ru kitku priŋ ɣa *uwajniaʔ ɣa alan s~ɕu timuʔ.
S.FORM: tiku pa panaqali' su qali' na kahuniq ka tatimu' rakus ga isamama'ah tikay la ga yani a timu' ru kitku pring ga vuwaynia' ga alan su timu'.
S.PHON: tiku pa panaqaliʔ s~ɕu qaliʔ na kaħuniq ka tatimuʔ rakus~ɕ ɣa is~ɕamamaʔaħ tikaj la ɣa jani a timuʔ ru kitku priŋ ɣa *uwajniaʔ ɣa alan s~ɕu timuʔ.
S.TRANSL: 樹皮如果有鹹味,像是樟樹,如果有點酸酸的,那個就當作鹽巴.羅氏鹽膚木的果實也拿來當作鹽巴.
For the bark of trees that was salty, like that of the camphor trees, if it was a little sour, we made it into salt. For the Rhus javanica tree, its fruits were taken as salt.

S.FORM: ru maqaq muwah lawwi maqahquwaw lawwi ru puah mha vay i mavatu'an la.
S.PHON: ru maqaq muwaħ lawwi maqaħquwaw lawwi ru puaħ mħa *aj i ma*atuʔan la.
S.FORM: ru maqaq muwah lawwi maqahquwaw lawwi ru puah mha vay i mavatu'an la.
S.PHON: ru maqaq muwaħ lawwi maqaħquwaw lawwi ru puaħ mħa *aj i ma*atuʔan la.
S.TRANSL: 再往下坡就到了Mavatu'an.
As they came down hill a little more, they arrived at Mavatu'an.

S.FORM: ru muwah ku gipun la yani ku maymal su kaal ru masiya matupagal su kaal masiyaw larua? ku gipun hani ru.
S.PHON: ru muwaħ ku ɣipun la jani ku majmal s~ɕu kaal ru mas~ɕija matupaɣal s~ɕu kaal mas~ɕijaw larua? ku ɣipun ħani ru.
S.FORM: ru muwah ku gipun la yani ku maymal su kaal ru masiya matupagal su kaal masiyaw larua? ku gipun hani ru.
S.PHON: ru muwaħ ku ɣipun la jani ku majmal s~ɕu kaal ru mas~ɕija matupaɣal s~ɕu kaal mas~ɕijaw larua? ku ɣipun ħani ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後日本人就來了.日本人在這有超過六十年嗎?
And the Japanese came. Were the Japanese here over sixty years?

S.FORM: ki'inia' talan ru kia suquliq ka suguhiloq i ragiax ru tu'unnia' ku gipun mha hali magan ru pasivaqayta' su paptawwaw mha ku gipun ru.
S.PHON: kiʔiniaʔ talan ru kia s~ɕuquliq ka s~ɕuɣuħiloq i raɣiax ru tuʔunniaʔ ku ɣipun mħa ħali maɣan ru pas~ɕi*aqajtaʔ s~ɕu paptawwaw mħa ku ɣipun ru.
S.FORM: ki'inia' talan ru kia suquliq ka suguhiloq i ragiax ru tu'unnia' ku gipun mha hali magan ru pasivaqayta' su paptawwaw mha ku gipun ru.
S.PHON: kiʔiniaʔ talan ru kia s~ɕuquliq ka s~ɕuɣuħiloq i raɣiax ru tuʔunniaʔ ku ɣipun mħa ħali maɣan ru pas~ɕi*aqajtaʔ s~ɕu paptawwaw mħa ku ɣipun ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們大概看到山上有人在生煙,就說:"去帶他們!" 日本人就說:"我們來教他們工作吧!"
They probably saw there were people making smoke in the mountains, and said "Go take them!" "Let's teach them how to work!" said the Japanese.

S.FORM: ru pasivaqansaminia' su patwawan la ru.
S.PHON: ru pas~ɕi*aqans~ɕaminiaʔ s~ɕu patwawan la ru.
S.FORM: ru pasivaqansaminia' su patwawan la ru.
S.PHON: ru pas~ɕi*aqans~ɕaminiaʔ s~ɕu patwawan la ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他們便教導了我們工作的方式.
Then, they taught us the way of working.

S.FORM: kumaaysami su slaq la.
S.PHON: kumaajs~ɕami s~ɕu s~ɕlaq la.
S.FORM: kumaaysami su slaq la.
S.PHON: kumaajs~ɕami s~ɕu s~ɕlaq la.
S.TRANSL: 我們就挖田.
We dug some fields.

S.FORM: ku yani ga tiku kinqiyanuxmian sku kinakimian i mavatu'an sunga' ki ga.
S.PHON: ku jani ɣa tiku kinqijanuxmian s~ɕku kinakimian i ma*atuʔan s~ɕuŋaʔ ki ɣa.
S.FORM: ku yani ga tiku kinqiyanuxmian sku kinakimian i mavatu'an sunga' ki ga.
S.PHON: ku jani ɣa tiku kinqijanuxmian s~ɕku kinakimian i ma*atuʔan s~ɕuŋaʔ ki ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我們過去留在Mavatu'an的生活.
This is just our lives during our stay in Mavatu'an in the past.

S.FORM: mumuwa' su sayi' mumuwa' su qagirang nanu' yani ku siqiyanuxmian ru.
S.PHON: mumuwaʔ s~ɕu s~ɕajiʔ mumuwaʔ s~ɕu qaɣiraŋ nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕiqijanuxmian ru.
S.FORM: mumuwa' su sayi' mumuwa' su qagirang nanu' yani ku siqiyanuxmian ru.
S.PHON: mumuwaʔ s~ɕu s~ɕajiʔ mumuwaʔ s~ɕu qaɣiraŋ nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕiqijanuxmian ru.
S.TRANSL: 種植芋頭,種植豆子,我們就是以此維生.
we planted taros and planted beans. That's what we depended on when we lived.

S.FORM: gini'un taal ga aqih gi qaat kuing i sinlanga'an sinvilan kai' nku navakis sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ɣiniʔun taal ɣa aqiħ ɣi qaat kuiŋ i s~ɕinlaŋaʔan s~ɕin*ilan kaiʔ nku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: gini'un taal ga aqih gi qaat kuing i sinlanga'an sinvilan kai' nku navakis sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ɣiniʔun taal ɣa aqiħ ɣi qaat kuiŋ i s~ɕinlaŋaʔan s~ɕin*ilan kaiʔ nku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 這麼看來,很不幸地我沒有跟隨過去老人家的交代.
Seen in this way, it is unfortunate that I did not follow the orders and the words of the elders in the past.

S.FORM: valayq uwi ku kinqiyanux ka asi nku yani ga gi ukas tikay a inakuxan.
S.PHON: *alajq uwi ku kinqijanux ka as~ɕi nku jani ɣa ɣi ukas~ɕ tikaj a inakuxan.
S.FORM: valayq uwi ku kinqiyanux ka asi nku yani ga gi ukas tikay a inakuxan.
S.PHON: *alajq uwi ku kinqijanux ka as~ɕi nku jani ɣa ɣi ukas~ɕ tikaj a inakuxan.
S.TRANSL: 像那樣的生活也是很好,因為比較沒有擔心的事.
Living like that is also good, because there is less to worry about.

S.FORM: ini' kuxaal sunga'.
S.PHON: iniʔ kuxaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: ini' kuxaal sunga'.
S.PHON: iniʔ kuxaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 過去沒有病痛.
There was no sickness in the past.

S.FORM: ni'i luwaw su kaqilan ru nanu' asi kaqiyanux asi suvalay nku ku sqas qasinu.
S.PHON: niʔi luwaw s~ɕu kaqilan ru nanuʔ as~ɕi kaqijanux as~ɕi s~ɕu*alaj nku ku s~ɕqas~ɕ qas~ɕinu.
S.FORM: ni'i luwaw su kaqilan ru nanu' asi kaqiyanux asi suvalay nku ku sqas qasinu.
S.PHON: niʔi luwaw s~ɕu kaqilan ru nanuʔ as~ɕi kaqijanux as~ɕi s~ɕu*alaj nku ku s~ɕqas~ɕ qas~ɕinu.
S.TRANSL: 不會找到不好的事,而且能夠就只像野獸那樣生活.
One would not find terrible things, and could just live like the beasts.

S.FORM: panqu'anay simu ku na'aring i i mavatu'an ru taihuk sku savawqil hani ku rauwq na ralu' ralu' nku rauwq ka inuwahanmian.
S.PHON: panquʔanaj s~ɕimu ku naʔariŋ i i ma*atuʔan ru taiħuk s~ɕku s~ɕa*awqil ħani ku rauwq na raluʔ raluʔ nku rauwq ka inuwaħanmian.
S.FORM: panqu'anay simu ku na'aring i i mavatu'an ru taihuk sku savawqil hani ku rauwq na ralu' ralu' nku rauwq ka inuwahanmian.
S.PHON: panquʔanaj s~ɕimu ku naʔariŋ i i ma*atuʔan ru taiħuk s~ɕku s~ɕa*awqil ħani ku rauwq na raluʔ raluʔ nku rauwq ka inuwaħanmian.
S.TRANSL: 我來敘述從Mavatu'an開始一直到部落Savawqil這裡,以及我們所走過土地的地名.
I'll describe how we started from Mavatu'an and arrived at Savawqil here, and the names of the places which we passed through as we travelled.

S.FORM: matu'an tigi runinia' ga ga gawng kating sern.
S.PHON: matuʔan tiɣi runiniaʔ ɣa ɣa ɣawŋ katiŋ s~ɕern.
S.FORM: matu'an tigi runinia' ga ga gawng kating sern.
S.PHON: matuʔan tiɣi runiniaʔ ɣa ɣa ɣawŋ katiŋ s~ɕern.
S.TRANSL: 最往Mavatu'an 那一邊,是Gawng Kating.
Up toward Mavatu'an is Gawng Kating.

S.FORM: tigi runinia' ga miyahunia' lawwi ga miyahunia' lawwi ga sayta' siri.
S.PHON: tiɣi runiniaʔ ɣa mijaħuniaʔ lawwi ɣa mijaħuniaʔ lawwi ɣa s~ɕajtaʔ s~ɕiri.
S.FORM: tigi runinia' ga miyahunia' lawwi ga miyahunia' lawwi ga sayta' siri.
S.PHON: tiɣi runiniaʔ ɣa mijaħuniaʔ lawwi ɣa mijaħuniaʔ lawwi ɣa s~ɕajtaʔ s~ɕiri.
S.TRANSL: Mavatu'an 那一邊,但是Gawng Kating再下來一點,是Sayta' Siri.
Toward the side of Mavatu'an, but down from Gawng Kating is Sayta' Siri.

S.FORM: s say mayahu'nia' la ga takmaya'an.
S.PHON: s~ɕ s~ɕaj majaħuʔniaʔ la ɣa takmajaʔan.
S.FORM: s say mayahu'nia' la ga takmaya'an.
S.PHON: s~ɕ s~ɕaj majaħuʔniaʔ la ɣa takmajaʔan.
S.TRANSL: Sayta' Siri的下面,是Takmaya'an.
Downward from Sayta' Siri would be Takmaya'an.

S.FORM: muwah la ga paqalapaw.
S.PHON: muwaħ la ɣa paqalapaw.
S.FORM: muwah la ga paqalapaw.
S.PHON: muwaħ la ɣa paqalapaw.
S.TRANSL: 再往這邊來,是Paqalapaw.
Coming further toward us from Takmaya'an, one would reach Paqalapaw.

S.FORM: miyahunia' la ga tinapa'an.
S.PHON: mijaħuniaʔ la ɣa tinapaʔan.
S.FORM: miyahunia' la ga tinapa'an.
S.PHON: mijaħuniaʔ la ɣa tinapaʔan.
S.TRANSL: Paqalapaw的下面就是Tinapa'an.
Down from Paqalapaw would be Tinapa'an.

S.FORM: ru yahunia' la ga tatapihan.
S.PHON: ru jaħuniaʔ la ɣa tatapiħan.
S.FORM: ru yahunia' la ga tatapihan.
S.PHON: ru jaħuniaʔ la ɣa tatapiħan.
S.TRANSL: Tinapa'an的下面是Tatapihan.
Down from Tinapa'an would be Tatapihan.

S.FORM: miyahu'nia' la ga nawmatah.
S.PHON: mijaħuʔniaʔ la ɣa nawmataħ.
S.FORM: miyahu'nia' la ga nawmatah.
S.PHON: mijaħuʔniaʔ la ɣa nawmataħ.
S.TRANSL: Tatapihan的下面就是Nawmatah.
Down from Tatapihan would be Nawmatah.

S.FORM: ru taihuk sugu'ivu' ru yahu' nku sugu'ivu' lawwi ga nanu' yani ku salun mha savawqil la ru nanu' haniansami maki sku kaki'anmian hani ru.
S.PHON: ru taiħuk s~ɕuɣuʔi*uʔ ru jaħuʔ nku s~ɕuɣuʔi*uʔ lawwi ɣa nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕalun mħa s~ɕa*awqil la ru nanuʔ ħanians~ɕami maki s~ɕku kakiʔanmian ħani ru.
S.FORM: ru taihuk sugu'ivu' ru yahu' nku sugu'ivu' lawwi ga nanu' yani ku salun mha savawqil la ru nanu' haniansami maki sku kaki'anmian hani ru.
S.PHON: ru taiħuk s~ɕuɣuʔi*uʔ ru jaħuʔ nku s~ɕuɣuʔi*uʔ lawwi ɣa nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕalun mħa s~ɕa*awqil la ru nanuʔ ħanians~ɕami maki s~ɕku kakiʔanmian ħani ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後就到了Sugu'ivu',然後Sugu'ivu'再往下就是我們所稱呼的Savawqil,也就是我們現在所在的地方.
Afterwards one would arrive at Sugu'ivu', and much downward from Sugu'ivu' would be what is called Savawqil, which is the place we are at right here now.

S.FORM: atu' na muwani zhishita' muwani maqiyanux i sunga' ki ga ga ma'usa' vay aqih ku kinqiyanux sunga' ga asiga qasinu rum.
S.PHON: atuʔ na muwani *ħis~ɕħitaʔ muwani maqijanux i s~ɕuŋaʔ ki ɣa ɣa maʔus~ɕaʔ *aj aqiħ ku kinqijanux s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa as~ɕiɣa qas~ɕinu rum.
S.FORM: atu' na muwani zhishita' muwani maqiyanux i sunga' ki ga ga ma'usa' vay aqih ku kinqiyanux sunga' ga asiga qasinu rum.
S.PHON: atuʔ na muwani *ħis~ɕħitaʔ muwani maqijanux i s~ɕuŋaʔ ki ɣa ɣa maʔus~ɕaʔ *aj aqiħ ku kinqijanux s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa as~ɕiɣa qas~ɕinu rum.
S.TRANSL: 假如我們只是像過去那樣生活,生活真的會很不好,因為就像野獸.
Suppose we kept on living like that in the past, our lives were really going to be bad because we were just like the beasts.

S.FORM: umiyu ku malahang ita' la.
S.PHON: umiju ku malaħaŋ itaʔ la.
S.FORM: umiyu ku malahang ita' la.
S.PHON: umiju ku malaħaŋ itaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 統治我們的人已經改變了.
Those ruling us have changed now.

S.FORM: sayugun nku tu'iya' la ku malahang ita' la ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕajuɣun nku tuʔijaʔ la ku malaħaŋ itaʔ la ru.
S.FORM: sayugun nku tu'iya' la ku malahang ita' la ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕajuɣun nku tuʔijaʔ la ku malaħaŋ itaʔ la ru.
S.TRANSL: 統治我們的人已經替換成漢人.
Those ruling us have been replaced by the Chinese.

S.FORM: vali i aqih la pi nage ki kinlahangan nku gipun ka tikuksiyugi ku.
S.PHON: *ali i aqiħ la pi naɣe ki kinlaħaŋan nku ɣipun ka tikuks~ɕijuɣi ku.
S.FORM: vali i aqih la pi nage ki kinlahangan nku gipun ka tikuksiyugi ku.
S.PHON: *ali i aqiħ la pi naɣe ki kinlaħaŋan nku ɣipun ka tikuks~ɕijuɣi ku.
S.TRANSL: 並不是說帝國主義日本統治的不好.
It's not that the imperialist Japanese treated us badly when ruling us.

S.FORM: ku kinlahangan na tu'iya' hani ka si kavalayq la ru.
S.PHON: ku kinlaħaŋan na tuʔijaʔ ħani ka s~ɕi ka*alajq la ru.
S.FORM: ku kinlahangan na tu'iya' hani ka si kavalayq la ru.
S.PHON: ku kinlaħaŋan na tuʔijaʔ ħani ka s~ɕi ka*alajq la ru.
S.TRANSL: 漢人也統治的很好.
The Chinese ruled us well.

S.FORM: mahuway suvalay ku malahang ita' hani ka.
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕu*alaj ku malaħaŋ itaʔ ħani ka.
S.FORM: mahuway suvalay ku malahang ita' hani ka.
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕu*alaj ku malaħaŋ itaʔ ħani ka.
S.TRANSL: 非常感謝在這裡統治我們的人.
Thank those who are ruling us here.

S.FORM: anananu niannia' i sipasivaq ru.
S.PHON: anananu nianniaʔ i s~ɕipas~ɕi*aq ru.
S.FORM: anananu niannia' i sipasivaq ru.
S.PHON: anananu nianniaʔ i s~ɕipas~ɕi*aq ru.
S.TRANSL: 不管如何,他們都在教導.
No matter what, they are teaching.

S.FORM: uN niannia' i kinkiyu ku inkahulan nku navakis nku itaal.
S.PHON: un nianniaʔ i kinkiju ku inkaħulan nku na*akis~ɕ nku itaal.
S.FORM: uN niannia' i kinkiyu ku inkahulan nku navakis nku itaal.
S.PHON: un nianniaʔ i kinkiju ku inkaħulan nku na*akis~ɕ nku itaal.
S.TRANSL: 他們在研究泰雅族的起源.
They are doing research on the origin of the Atayal people.

S.FORM: ini' kusa m mha uw simu ka itaal ga ga simu nanak ini' kusa ru mahuway suvalay ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ kus~ɕa m mħa uw s~ɕimu ka itaal ɣa ɣa s~ɕimu nanak iniʔ kus~ɕa ru maħuwaj s~ɕu*alaj ru.
S.FORM: ini' kusa m mha uw simu ka itaal ga ga simu nanak ini' kusa ru mahuway suvalay ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ kus~ɕa m mħa uw s~ɕimu ka itaal ɣa ɣa s~ɕimu nanak iniʔ kus~ɕa ru maħuwaj s~ɕu*alaj ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們並沒有說你們原住民單獨就好,真的很感謝.
They didn't say "You aborigines, live by yourself!" We are really thankful.

S.FORM: nanu' uw ita' ka itaal hani ki ga kalawkahayta' kahavag nakita' i ma manavalayq maqiyanux ku vavawuraw hani.
S.PHON: nanuʔ uw itaʔ ka itaal ħani ki ɣa kalawkaħajtaʔ kaħa*aɣ nakitaʔ i ma mana*alajq maqijanux ku *a*awuraw ħani.
S.FORM: nanu' uw ita' ka itaal hani ki ga kalawkahayta' kahavag nakita' i ma manavalayq maqiyanux ku vavawuraw hani.
S.PHON: nanuʔ uw itaʔ ka itaal ħani ki ɣa kalawkaħajtaʔ kaħa*aɣ nakitaʔ i ma mana*alajq maqijanux ku *a*awuraw ħani.
S.TRANSL: 我們這裡的原住民們,我們大家一起努力,才能好好的在這塊土地上生活.
We aborigines here, let's all work hard, so that we can live well on this land.

S.FORM: ana ku kamisama' uwi ga kalahangayta'nia'.
S.PHON: ana ku kamis~ɕamaʔ uwi ɣa kalaħaŋajtaʔniaʔ.
S.FORM: ana ku kamisama' uwi ga kalahangayta'nia'.
S.PHON: ana ku kamis~ɕamaʔ uwi ɣa kalaħaŋajtaʔniaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 就連上帝也會照顧我們.
Even God will take care of us.

S.FORM: asita' paspungi kamisama' ka ma'usa' malahang ita'.
S.PHON: as~ɕitaʔ pas~ɕpuŋi kamis~ɕamaʔ ka maʔus~ɕaʔ malaħaŋ itaʔ.
S.FORM: asita' paspungi kamisama' ka ma'usa' malahang ita'.
S.PHON: as~ɕitaʔ pas~ɕpuŋi kamis~ɕamaʔ ka maʔus~ɕaʔ malaħaŋ itaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們就順從會照顧我們的耶穌吧.
Let's just obey God, who's going to take care of us.

W.TRANSL: 非實現-衡量-非主焦.非實現

S.FORM: mahuway simu.
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕimu.
S.FORM: mahuway simu.
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕimu.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝你們.
Thank you all.
